languages.text: "Умоляю, мне опостылела эта игра. Даже спустя столько лет, после всех модификаций..." {n}Себериан стучит пальцами по груди, и из-под мундира раздается глухой лязг.{/n} "...знатные дома не оставляют надежд найти связи с династией Вольного Торговца. Если бы вы знали, скольких подобных "бастардов" я казнил, вы бы не решились на подобную ложь. Вам следует оставить мечты о Патенте, если хотите сохранить жизнь".

traits.locale_text: [драфт] говорит, что предположение, что мы — его бастард — нелепо и даже опасно. У него есть та, в ком он видит наследницу, так что лучше нам подумать еще раз, чем нести этот бред.

languages.text: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."
languages.original_text: "Умоляю, мне опостылела эта игра. Если бы вы знали, скольких подобных "бастардов" я казнил, вы бы не решились на подобную ложь. Вам следует оставить мечты о Патенте, если хотите сохранить жизнь".

If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

languages.text: “够了，这套把戏我早就厌倦了。哪怕过了这么多年，做了这么多改造……”{n}塞贝里安用手指敲了敲自己的胸膛，制服下传出空洞的金属回响。{/n}“……那些贵族世家还是不死心，总想攀上行商浪人王朝的血脉。你要是知道我处决过多少这种‘私生子’，就不敢在这儿信口雌黄了。若还想活命，就别打贸易授状的主意。”
languages.original_text: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

traits.locale_text: “够了，这套把戏我早就厌倦了。哪怕过了这么多年，做了这么多改造……”{n}塞贝里安用手指敲了敲自己的胸膛，制服下传出空洞的金属回响。{/n}“……那些贵族世家还是不死心，总想攀上行商浪人王朝的血脉。你要是知道我处决过多少这种‘私生子’，就不敢在这儿信口雌黄了。若还想活命，就别打贸易授状的主意。”

languages.text: « De grâce, j'en ai plus qu'assez de ce petit jeu. Même après toutes ces années, toutes ces modifications... » {n}Seberian tapote sa cage thoracique du bout des doigts et un son creux s'élève des replis de son uniforme.{/n} « ... les nobles maisons n'ont toujours pas perdu espoir de se découvrir des liens avec la dynastie du libre-marchand. Si vous saviez combien de ces prétendus "bâtards" j'ai fait exécuter, vous n'oseriez pas proférer de tels mensonges. Si vous tenez à la vie, renoncez dès à présent à vos folles prétentions à la lettre de marque. »
languages.original_text: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

traits.locale_text: « De grâce, j'en ai plus qu'assez de ce petit jeu. Même après toutes ces années, toutes ces modifications... » {n}Seberian tapote sa cage thoracique du bout des doigts et un son creux s'élève des replis de son uniforme.{/n} « ... les nobles maisons n'ont toujours pas perdu espoir de se découvrir des liens avec la dynastie du libre-marchand. Si vous saviez combien de ces prétendus "bâtards" j'ai fait exécuter, vous n'oseriez pas proférer de tels mensonges. Si vous tenez à la vie, renoncez dès à présent à vos folles prétentions à la lettre de marque. »

languages.text: "Oynadığın bu oyundan sıkıldım. Bunca yıldan, bunca modifikasyondan sonra bile..." {n}Seberian, parmaklarını göğsüne vurarak üniformasının altından içi boş bir tıkırtı sesi çıkarıyor.{/n} "Soylu haneler, Hür Tacir hanedanlıklarıyla bağ kurma umudundan bir türlü vazgeçmiyor. Bu şekilde idam ettiğim 'piçlerin' sayısını bilseydin böyle yalanlar söylemeye cüret edemezdin. Nefes almaya devam etmek istiyorsan Ruhsatname hayallerinden vazgeçmelisin."
languages.original_text: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

traits.locale_text: "Oynadığın bu oyundan sıkıldım. Bunca yıldan, bunca modifikasyondan sonra bile..." {n}Seberian, parmaklarını göğsüne vurarak üniformasının altından içi boş bir tıkırtı sesi çıkarıyor.{/n} "Soylu haneler, Hür Tacir hanedanlıklarıyla bağ kurma umudundan bir türlü vazgeçmiyor. Bu şekilde idam ettiğim 'piçlerin' sayısını bilseydin böyle yalanlar söylemeye cüret edemezdin. Nefes almaya devam etmek istiyorsan Ruhsatname hayallerinden vazgeçmelisin."

languages.text: «Por favor, estoy harto de este juego. Después de todos estos años, y de tantas modificaciones...». {n}Seberian golpea con los dedos su pecho, haciendo que un sonido hueco resuene desde debajo de su uniforme.{/n} «... las casas nobles siguen intentando encontrar vínculos con la dinastía del Comerciante Independiente. Si supiera a cuántos de estos "bastardos" he hecho ejecutar, no soltaría semejantes patrañas. Debería dejar atrás los sueños de la Patente si quiere conservar la vida».
languages.original_text: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

traits.locale_text: «Por favor, estoy harto de este juego. Después de todos estos años, y de tantas modificaciones...». {n}Seberian golpea con los dedos su pecho, haciendo que un sonido hueco resuene desde debajo de su uniforme.{/n} «... las casas nobles siguen intentando encontrar vínculos con la dinastía del Comerciante Independiente. Si supiera a cuántos de estos "bastardos" he hecho ejecutar, no soltaría semejantes patrañas. Debería dejar atrás los sueños de la Patente si quiere conservar la vida».

languages.text: "Bitte, ich bin dieses Spiel wirklich leid. Selbst nach all den Jahren und Modifikationen ..." {n}Seberian streicht sich mit seinen Fingern über die Brust und erzeugt dabei ein rasselndes Geräusch unter seiner Uniform.{/n} "... haben die edlen Häuser die Hoffnung nicht aufgegeben, eine Verbindung zur Dynastie des Freihändlers herzustellen. Wenn Ihr wüsstet, wie viele solche 'Bastarde' ich schon exekutiert habe, würdet Ihr Euch derartige Lügen sparen. Ihr solltet Euren Traum vom Handelsbrief aufgeben, wenn Ihr Euer Leben behalten wollt."
languages.original_text: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte, ich bin dieses Spiel wirklich leid. Selbst nach all den Jahren und Modifikationen ..." {n}Seberian streicht sich mit seinen Fingern über die Brust und erzeugt dabei ein rasselndes Geräusch unter seiner Uniform.{/n} "... haben die edlen Häuser die Hoffnung nicht aufgegeben, eine Verbindung zur Dynastie des Freihändlers herzustellen. Wenn Ihr wüsstet, wie viele solche 'Bastarde' ich schon exekutiert habe, würdet Ihr Euch derartige Lügen sparen. Ihr solltet Euren Traum vom Handelsbrief aufgeben, wenn Ihr Euer Leben behalten wollt."

languages.text: 「頼むから、私はこの茶番にはもううんざりなのだ。これほどの歳月を経て、幾度もの改造を重ねてもなお…」{n}セベリアンが指で胸を叩くと、制服の下から空ろな金属音が響く。{/n}「…貴族どもは、ローグ・トレーダー家の血筋との縁を見つける望みをいまだ捨てていない。私がこの手の『まがい者』を何人処刑してきたか知れば、貴様もそのような偽りを吐く気にはなるまい。命が惜しければ、令状の夢など捨てることだ。」
languages.original_text: "Please, I am sick and tired of this game. Even after all these years, after all the modifications..." {n}Seberian raps his fingers against his chest, producing a hollow clanking sound from beneath his uniform.{/n} "...the noble houses have still not given up hope of finding ties to the Rogue Trader dynasty. If you knew how many such 'bastards' I had executed, you would not dare to spew such lies. You should abandon your dreams of the Warrant if you wish to keep your life."

traits.locale_text: 「頼むから、私はこの茶番にはもううんざりなのだ。これほどの歳月を経て、幾度もの改造を重ねてもなお…」{n}セベリアンが指で胸を叩くと、制服の下から空ろな金属音が響く。{/n}「…貴族どもは、ローグ・トレーダー家の血筋との縁を見つける望みをいまだ捨てていない。私がこの手の『まがい者』を何人処刑してきたか知れば、貴様もそのような偽りを吐く気にはなるまい。命が惜しければ、令状の夢など捨てることだ。」
